rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level state; use component type scope for abstract assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure by only referencing ports, subcomponents, or connections explicitly defined in the input model.
Ensure AGREE annex content respects the scope boundary between component type and implementation.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` with double asterisks.
Use only identifiers that appear in the AADL model as extracted by the Model Analyst.
anti_patterns: Do not assume AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) are visible as variables in AGREE.
Do not introduce numeric range comparisons over Boolean or enumeration ports without explicit numeric representation in AADL.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
